summary: Backend: hybrid (multi-harness + OpenSpec). C-101 and C-102 merged (2/10) — bootstrap pillars live, PoC scaffolded + first codegen run + desktop branding/UX round, all verified building/running on Tauri desktop and web. Inference architecture for C-103/C-105/C-109 revised by user (liter-llm gateway, mistral.rs, WebLLM web lane, config DB). Now starting C-103 (chat-live-e2e, revised scope) in-session.
